meta.title: The Significant Role of Mother Tongue in Education
meta.sourceDoc: 95. P3 - The Significant Role of Mother Tongue in Education 母语教育.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: The Significant Role of Mother Tongue in Education 母语教育

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：C
PDF 定位：第2段：.the cultural, linguistic, and economic resources of the nation are maximised... To waste the resources of the nation... is... unintelligent from the point of view of national self-interest."
PDF 解析：该段强调从国家经济/国家利益出发，发展与保留母语能最大化国家资源。等 价于"双语儿童能为国家财富作出贡献"。A"研究误导"、B"项目只利部分儿 童"、D"应强化法律"均未提。

题目 28
答案：A
PDF 定位：第3段:More than 150 research studies... strongly support what Goethe once said....
PDF 解析：先给"150+项研究"，后引歌德名言；作用是为观点增重（lendweight)。 B"反驳研究"、C"新概念"、D"更新观念"均不符。

题目 29
答案：B
PDF 定位：第4段: "Children... with a solid foundation in their mother tongue... come to school well-prepared to learn the school language and succeed educationally."
PDF 解析：义。A"教年长家人"、C"读族裔故事"、D"家庭关系更强"文中未述。

题目 30
答案：D
PDF 定位：第5段首句："Someeducatorsandparentsare suspicious...because they worry that they take time away from the majority language."
PDF 解析：直对应D"占用宝贵的在校时间"。A"学读写更慢"、B"混淆两语"、C"降低兴 趣"非作者给出的理由。

答案：D

questionSections.text:
题目 31
答案：I
PDF 定位：第7段："bilingual children seem topick up'conversational sklls in the majority language quickly.
PDF 解析："很快获得用主流语言交谈的能力"→ability。

题目 32
答案：D
PDF 定位：第7段:"how quickly children can lose their ability... The extent and rapidity of language los..
PDF 解析：讨论母语消失的速度/速率→rate。

题目 33
答案：J
PDF 定位：第7段:"willvary according to the concentration of families...in the neighborhood."
PDF 解析：取决于同语群体在某一地区/社区的集中度→area。

题目 34
答案：F
PDF 定位：第7段: ..in speaking with their peers and siblings and in responding to their parents.
PDF 解析：即便面对家人/父母也转用主流语→family。

题目 35
答案：C
PDF 定位：第7段末：..the linguistic division... hasbecome an emotional
PDF 解析：形成整体的疏离/错位感→dislocation。

题目 33

PDF 定位：第7段:"willvary according to the concentration of families...in the neighborhood."
PDF 解析：取决于同语群体在某一地区/社区的集中度→area。

题目 34
答案：F
PDF 定位：第7段: ..in speaking with their peers and siblings and in responding to their parents.
PDF 解析：即便面对家人/父母也转用主流语→family。

题目 35
答案：C
PDF 定位：第7段末：..the linguistic division... hasbecome an emotional

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：YES
PDF 定位/解析：chasm. Pupils frequently become alienated...

题目 37
答案：NO
PDF 定位：第5段:"One of the most strongly established findings of educational research... well-implemented bilingual programs can promote literacy and subject-matter knowledge in a minority
PDF 解析：题干声称"研究证明在校学主流语对母语有不良影响"。原文强调研究 表明双语项目提升少数语读写，且两种语言相互滋养，与题干断言相 反，故NO。

题目 38
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：第5段:"Within Europe, the Foyer program in Belgium ...in three languages (their mother tongue, Dutch and French)."
PDF 解析：只说比利时的Foyer项目及其使用语言（含法语)；未提"法国教育系统将/ 计划采用"。无正反信息→NOTGIVEN。

题目 39
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位/解析：language.."；另见第4段："Transferacrosslanguages canbetwo- way; both languages nurture each other...

题目 40
答案：YES
PDF 定位：第6段:"there is transfer across languages in other skills such as knowing how to distinguish the main idea... and distinguishing fact from opinion."
PDF 解析：这些正是阅读理解策略，且可在两种语言间迁移，与题干一致。
